prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次依次约30600→28900→26000→22500→20450名，连续5年持续前移（位次数字逐年减小），近3年累计前移约5500名，2025年基准约20450名，呈明显上升趋势；该校在云南省理科/物理类招生计划逐年扩招：2021年22人→2022年29人→2023年31人→2024年36人→2025年41人→2026年45人，2026年较2025年扩招约9.8%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名校本部约第48–62名（2026年第62名），属于中上游211层次；校区位于新疆克拉玛依，与校本部共享211品牌效应；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档异常记录；抖音平台关注度一般，未进入高校热度榜单，报考热度无明显异常信号；作为中国石油大学（北京）校区，石油与天然气工程为该校王牌学科（第四轮评估A+），化学工程与技术、地质资源与地质工程等学科实力突出；校区招生专业以石油化工、机械、计算机类为主，与校本部优势学科一脉相承。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热，该校开设的计算机类、自动化、人工智能等专业受益于整体工科热度；云南省2026年高考总考生约37.8万人，较2025年明显增加，物理类考生估算约21.5万人（较2025年17.3万人增长约24%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；学校位于新疆克拉玛依，距云南较远，地域偏好对云南考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用；该校在云南招生占比逐年提升（2021年22人→2026年45人），反映学校对云南生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移的强劲势头、2026年考生规模大幅增长（物理类+24%）带来的竞争加剧、以及学校211层次和工科专业热度的支撑，虽然2026年扩招约9.8%对位次有一定下拉作用，但考生增幅远超扩招幅度，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年约20450名基础上继续小幅前移；预测最低位次约20455名，区间19955–20955名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间19955–20955名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向（机械、新能源、能源动力、安全工程、化工等），一档专业（石油工程、自动化、计算机类等）作为冲刺目标，三档专业（资源勘查、会计学、经济学等）作为保底选择。位次明显优于区间上限（<19955名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 30600 → 28900 → 26000 → 22500 → 20450, continuously moving forward for 5 consecutive years (ranking numbers decreasing year by year). In the past 3 years, the cumulative forward movement is about 5500 places, with a baseline of about 20450 in 2025, showing a clear upward trend. The university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Yunnan Province has been expanding year by year: 22 in 2021 → 29 in 2022 → 31 in 2023 → 36 in 2024 → 41 in 2025 → 45 in 2026. Compared to 2025, the 2026 enrollment expands by about 9.8%, a relatively large expansion, which has a certain mitigating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, the main campus ranks approximately 48th to 62nd (62nd in 2026), belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. The campus is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, sharing the 211 brand effect with the main campus. In recent years, its reputation has been stable, with no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal admission records. On the Douyin platform, its attention is average, not entering the university popularity list, with no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. As a campus of China University of Petroleum (Beijing), petroleum and natural gas engineering is its ace discipline (A+ in the fourth round of evaluation), and disciplines such as chemical engineering and technology, geological resources and geological engineering are outstanding. The campus enrollment majors are mainly in petrochemical, mechanical, and computer categories, inheriting the advantageous disciplines of the main campus.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as computer, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering remains high. The computer, automation, and artificial intelligence majors offered by this campus benefit from the overall engineering popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Yunnan Province is about 378,000, a significant increase from 2025. The estimated number of physics category examinees is about 215,000 (an increase of about 24% from 173,000 in 2025), and the expansion of examinees intensifies competition. The school is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, far from Yunnan, and regional preferences have a certain inhibitory effect on the willingness of Yunnan candidates to apply. The proportion of enrollment in Yunnan has been increasing year by year (22 in 2021 → 45 in 2026), reflecting the school's emphasis on Yunnan student sources.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong momentum of continuous forward movement in historical rankings, the intensified competition due to the significant increase in the number of examinees in 2026 (physics category +24%), and the support of the school's 211 level and engineering major popularity, although the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 9.8% has a certain downward pull on rankings, the increase in examinees far exceeds the expansion rate. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to move forward slightly based on the approximately 20450 in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 20455, with a range of 19955–20955.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 19955–20955, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mechanical, New Energy, Energy and Power, Safety Engineering, Chemical Engineering, etc.) as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors (Petroleum Engineering, Automation, Computer Category, etc.) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Resource Exploration, Accounting, Economics, etc.) as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<19955), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 ace majors.
